question: What is happening in this image? Select from the following options: (A) A person is singing on a stage with a guitar.. (B) A person is playing a guitar alone on a stage.. (C) Multiple people are singing on a stage with several instruments.. (D) Multiple people are practicing for a concert on a stage..
gold_answer: Multiple people are singing on a stage with several instruments
answer_choices: A person is singing on a stage with a guitar
A person is playing a guitar alone on a stage
Multiple people are singing on a stage with several instruments
Multiple people are practicing for a concert on a stage

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A single person singing into a microphone, wearing a jacket with wings and text, standing alone on stage.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: Multiple people, instruments, practicing, concert preparation, group performance.
